title: “I spent $50,000 self-hosting AI models. You should too.” - 0xSero
summary: The video presents an argument that self-hosting AI models is worthwhile despite requiring significant capital investment. It covers local AI deployment, various models like GLM 5.2 and Fable 5, and discusses practical considerations for running inference infrastructure independently.
writeup: The video makes the case that self-hosting AI models is worthwhile even with substantial upfront capital, drawing on 0xSero's account of a $50,000 build. It covers local deployment and running inference infrastructure independently, referencing models including GLM 5.2 and Fable 5. The practical considerations for operating local inference are the focus, framed against the cost of the hardware investment.
